asset.title: Multi Agent Workbench
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: Excellent walkthrough demonstrating the multi-agent workbench executing complex financial QA tasks with clear step-by-step progress and final verification.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear command input and structured multi-agent execution grid.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows command entry, real-time agent execution, and final validation results.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed grid layout with clear status indicators.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's multi-agent and document verification workflow.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI interaction showing live state updates.

legibility.evidence: Main text is highly readable, though some grid details are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly demonstrates financial QA and SEC compliance use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately displays execution states and verification outcomes.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch the Multi-Agent Workbench execute parallel financial QA tasks and verify results against gold standards in real-time.
